mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members ( login_id, password, name, phone ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone} )
mapper.select: SELECT member_id, login_id, password, name, phone, created_at FROM members WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND password = #{password}
SELECT member_id, login_id, password, name, phone, created_at FROM members WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
